configurations.name: python-http
runtimeArgs:
import os, sys
ROOT = '/Users/arushnaudiyal/Documents/Developer/linkstash'
os.chdir(ROOT)
from http.server import HTTPServer, SimpleHTTPRequestHandler
class H(SimpleHTTPRequestHandler):
    def translate_path(self, path):
        path = path.split('?',1)[0].split('#',1)[0]
        path = path.lstrip('/')
        return os.path.join(ROOT, path) if path else os.path.join(ROOT, 'index.html')
print('Serving', ROOT, 'on http://127.0.0.1:8000', flush=True)
HTTPServer(('127.0.0.1', 8000), H).serve_forever()
